message:
feat(robot,share,tools): navigation views (urgent/ack/tooling/identity/config), share deploy hardening, reservation index improvements

Robot CLI (robot.rs — +865 lines):
- Add build_navigate_config_environment: exposes config/environment with
  redacted database URL via redact_navigate_database_url helper
- Add build_navigate_identity: resolves project identity with workspace
  root detection via navigate_workspace_root_from helper
- Add build_navigate_tooling: resource://tooling/{metrics,metrics_core,
  diagnostics,locks,capabilities/<agent>,recent/<window>} endpoints with
  tool filter support and stale-lock detection via /proc/<pid>
- Add NavigateViewKind enum with UrgentUnread, AckRequired, AcksStale,
  AckOverdue variants for build_navigate_view message query views
- Add parse_attachment_values helper for attachment JSON parsing
- Add navigate_ts_f64_to_rfc3339 for timestamp conversion with overflow
  safety (NAVIGATE_I64_MIN_F64/MAX_F64 bounds)
- Add project_human_key_sync for human-readable project key lookups
- Expand thread subject query to include created_ts and id columns
- Expand thread participants query to include sorting metadata

Share (deploy.rs, planner.rs, probe.rs, prompt.rs):
- deploy.rs: Enhanced deployment logic with improved error handling and
  retry strategies for remote deployment operations
- planner.rs: Improved deployment planning with better resource estimation
- probe.rs: Enhanced health probing with more granular status reporting
- prompt.rs: Improved prompt construction for deployment workflows

Models (models.rs): Add new fields for enhanced navigation data
Queries (queries.rs): Query optimizations for navigation view endpoints
Search (search_candidates.rs, search_fusion.rs): Minor search improvements
Server (lib.rs, tui_bridge.rs, tui_events.rs, tui_poller.rs): TUI
  event handling improvements and bridge updates
Messaging (messaging.rs): Message delivery improvements
Reservations (reservations.rs, reservation_index.rs): Improved
  reservation index with better conflict detection and cleanup
Resources (resources.rs): Resource URI routing updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1250,7 +1250,7 @@ fn reservation_released_ts_sql(
                  WHEN typeof({table_ref}.released_ts) = 'text' THEN \
                      CAST(strftime('%s', REPLACE(REPLACE({table_ref}.released_ts, 'T', ' '), 'Z', '')) AS INTEGER) * 1000000 + \
                      CASE WHEN instr({table_ref}.released_ts, '.') > 0 \
-                          THEN CAST(substr({table_ref}.released_ts || '000000', instr({table_ref}.released_ts, '.') + 1, 6) AS INTEGER) \
+                          THEN CAST(substr(REPLACE({table_ref}.released_ts, 'Z', '') || '000000', instr({table_ref}.released_ts, '.') + 1, 6) AS INTEGER) \
                           ELSE 0 \
                      END \
                  ELSE {table_ref}.released_ts \

@@ -686,7 +686,7 @@ fn build_tool_directory() -> ToolDirectory {
                 ToolDirectoryEntry {
                     name: "send_message".to_string(),
                     summary: "Deliver a new message with attachments, WebP conversion, and policy enforcement.".to_string(),
-                    use_when: "Starting new threads or broadcasting plans across projects.".to_string(),
+                    use_when: "Starting new threads or distributing plans to specific agents across projects.".to_string(),
                     related: vec!["reply_message".to_string(), "request_contact".to_string()],
                     expected_frequency: "Frequent—core write operation.".to_string(),
                     required_capabilities: vec!["messaging".to_string(), "write".to_string()],
